content_body: What a fun family trip. The large kitchen gave us plenty of room to make our delicious Thanksgiving meal and the open living room gave us lots of space to celebrate. The Ohio State University defeating Michigan in double overtime. GO BUCKS!!!!! We loved our view of the mountains and all the leaves changing colors. The train would drive by at night and we would run outside to see the train decorated with Christmas lights. We made great use of the hot but and pool table. Make sure to check out Blue Ridge, we went on Blue Friday and there were deals everywhere. Blue Jeans Pizza was fast and delicious. Check out Sweets- they won cupcake wars on Food Network. Ending our trip with family time around the wood burning fireplace. Would highly recommend Fallen Timber Lodge. - Ohio Buckeye Fans
title: Family Time around Fireplace
